code: import axios from'axios';const API_URL='http://localhost:8080/students';export const getStudents=()=>axios.get(API_URL);export const addStudent=student=>axios.post(API_URL,student);export const updateStudent=(id,student)=>axios.put(`${API_URL}/${id}`,student);export const deleteStudent=id=>axios.delete(`${API_URL}/${id}`);
